---
name: Workflow request
about: Propose an AGENT-DOCS workflow, scaffold, or tooling improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What confusion, repeated work, or unsafe handoff should AGENT-DOCS improve?

## Target reader or user

Who benefits from this change?

## Proposed shape

Describe the smallest useful doc, command, template, or workflow change.

## Safety notes

Does this touch installer behavior, target-repo writes, generated views, or
project-owned Markdown?

## Existing docs

Link any related `SPEC-*`, `PLAN-*`, `CONC-*`, guide, or issue.
